purpose: Route runtime intake envelopes to the next dry-run proposal family without mutating production resources.
hard_rules: Routing is proposal-only and must not mutate production resources.
Route families are non-exhaustive and policy-driven.
Unknown content must route to review gate.
User-submitted content remains review_required until a later review gate.
Production mutation and production deploy remain disabled.
priority_notes_non_exhaustive: When user text contains a concrete asset/copy operation plus generic event context (for example photos placed into an HPL match page), route by the concrete operation before generic match_record. This is policy guidance, not script hardcoding.
Explicit resource/schema requests route before content operations.
Concrete media or homepage-copy operations route before generic match/event context.
Score/result/standing-oriented match records route before generic event-page requests.
Priority is policy guidance, not script hardcoding; future content families should be added through policy.
